meta.title: DataForge — Self-hosted Database & API Platform
meta.description: Visual database management, API builder, webhooks, plugins. Self-hosted, free, with S&box game authentication. Deploy in 5 minutes with Docker.

hero.title: DataForge
hero.subtitle: Platform for database management and API building. Visual table designer, endpoints, webhooks — without writing code.
hero.marquee: Create databases · Build APIs · Automate backups · Connect plugins · Real-time sync · Visual query builder · S&box game auth · Deploy worldwide

features.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to build, manage, and scale your backend — visually.

tables.title: Tables
tables.description: Create and manage PostgreSQL tables visually. Add columns, indexes, foreign keys — no SQL needed.

api.title: API Builder
api.description: Design REST and GraphQL endpoints in a visual editor. Set auth, caching, rate limits — all from UI.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Trigger HTTP calls when data changes. Auto-retry on failure. Full delivery logs.

automations.title: Automations
automations.description: Cron jobs, visual flow builder, scheduled tasks. Connect Telegram, Email, Discord.

security.title: Security
security.description: 2FA, IP whitelist, row-level security, field encryption, DDoS protection via BunnyCDN.

sbox.title: S&box Auth
sbox.description: Built-in authentication for S&box game players via Facepunch API. Session-based, zero config.

distributed.title: Distributed
distributed.description: Deploy worker nodes worldwide. Each node is autonomous with own database, cache, and plugins.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Request analytics, error tracking, health monitoring, uptime dashboard — all built-in.

free.title: Free
free.description: Self-hosted. No vendor lock-in. Your server, your data, your rules. Free forever.

architecture.sectionSubtitle: Simple, distributed architecture. BunnyCDN handles traffic, workers process requests independently.

plugins.sectionSubtitle: Extend DataForge with built-in plugins. Connect services, add auth providers, manage storage.

openSource.sectionSubtitle: Self-hosted platform. Deploy on your server in 5 minutes with Docker. No subscriptions, data limits, or vendor lock-in.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple. Transparent. Free.
pricing.planDescription: Everything included. No limits on data. You host it, you own it.
pricing.limitsSubtitle: All limits are configurable by the admin through the UI panel. No hardcoded restrictions.

pricingMeta.title: Pricing — DataForge
pricingMeta.description: DataForge pricing: free, self-hosted, no limits. Deploy your own database platform with Docker.
